positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement of celestial bodies and whimsical flora. The central subject is a glowing crescent moon cradling a cluster of bioluminescent, oversized lily pads that transition into nebula clouds. Surrounding elements include abstract constellations drawn with flowing gold leaf lines, stylized shooting stars, and geometrically patterned ferns. Use a deep indigo and electric cyan color palette with accents of soft gold and luminous emerald. The composition must be clean, high-contrast, and highly scalable for apparel printing, emphasizing strong silhouettes and depth. Minimalist scientific fantasy aesthetic, vector illustration meets deep space art, designed with radial symmetry.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifact, smudge, dirty, grayscale, realistic photo, signature
